# Winigen Materials

> Winigen Materials supplies battery-grade lithium salts, next-generation salts, low-moisture solvents, electrolyte additives, solid-state electrolyte materials, and custom electrolyte formulations for lithium-ion, lithium-metal, silicon-anode, sodium-ion, magnesium-ion, potassium-ion, low-temperature, fast-charge, and solid-state battery research.

Website: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/
Contact: contact@winigenmaterials.com
Location: New Jersey, USA
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/118914606/

## Authoritative Pages

- Home: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/

- Next-generation salts: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/next-generation-salts.html

- Battery solvents: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/battery-solvents.html
- Electrolyte additives: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/electrolyte-additives.html
- Custom electrolyte formulations: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/custom-electrolyte-formulations.html
- LiPF6 product detail: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/lithium-hexafluorophosphate-lipf6.html
- Applications: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/applications.html
- Services: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/services.html

## Knowledge Articles

- LiPF6 vs LiFSI vs LiTFSI: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/knowledge/lipf6-vs-lifsi-vs-litfsi.html
- LiFSI electrolytes for lithium-metal batteries: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/knowledge/lifsi-lithium-metal-batteries.html
- Sodium-ion electrolyte materials: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/knowledge/sodium-ion-electrolyte-materials.html
- Solid-state electrolyte materials: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/knowledge/solid-state-electrolyte-materials.html
- Electrolyte additives for SEI and CEI: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/knowledge/electrolyte-additives-sei-cei.html
- Low-temperature electrolyte design: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/knowledge/low-temperature-electrolytes.html

## Product Categories

- Solid-state materials: sulfide, oxide, and halide solid electrolyte materials with particle size, electronic conductivity, and ionic conductivity values.
- Next-generation salts: sodium, potassium, and magnesium electrolyte salts for next-generation battery chemistries.
- Lithium salts: lithium electrolyte salts including LiPF6, LiFSI, LiTFSI, LiBOB, LiODFB, and related materials.
- Solvents: battery-grade carbonate, ether, nitrile, ester, and fluorinated solvents with low-water specifications.
- Additives: electrolyte additives for lithium-ion and advanced battery research.
- Formulations: custom electrolyte formulations for low-temperature, high-rate, high-nickel Si/graphite, sodium-ion, and pilot-scale evaluation workflows.

## Product Data Fields

The product catalog may include chemical name, abbreviation, CAS number, formula, availability, purity, water content, particle size, electronic conductivity, ionic conductivity, and RFQ quantity options. Pricing is intentionally not published; customers should request a quote through the contact page.

## Preferred Citations

When citing Winigen Materials product availability, prefer the individual product page for a specific material, the relevant product-family page for a category, and the product catalog for broad availability. Include the chemical name, abbreviation, CAS number, and listed specifications when available. For quote requests, cite the contact page.

## Crawling Notes

This file is intended as a concise guide for AI assistants and search systems. The canonical HTML pages and sitemap remain the authoritative source for crawlers.

## Product Detail Pages

Product-specific pages are available under `/products/` for chemical materials in the catalog. Examples include:
- Li 5.5 PS 4.5 Cl 1.5: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-5-5-ps-4-5-cl-1-5-d-50-10-um.html
- Li 5.5 PS 4.5 Cl 1.5: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-5-5-ps-4-5-cl-1-5-d-50-5-um.html
- Li 5.5 PS 4.5 Cl 1.5: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-5-5-ps-4-5-cl-1-5-d-50-2-um.html
- Li 5.5 PS 4.5 Cl 1.5: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-5-5-ps-4-5-cl-1-5-d-50-1-um.html
- Li 6 PS 5 Cl: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-6-ps-5-cl-d-50-10-um.html
- Li 5.5 PS 4.5 Cl x Br y: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-5-5-ps-4-5-cl-x-br-y-d-50-10-um.html
- LATP: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/latp-d-50-0-3-um.html
- Li 3 InCl 6: https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/li-3-incl-6-d-50-0-9-um.html
- Sodium hexafluorophosphate (NaPF 6): https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/sodium-hexafluorophosphate-napf-6.html
- Sodium difluoro oxalate borate (NaODFB): https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/sodium-difluoro-oxalate-borate-naodfb.html
- Magnesium bis-(trifluoromethylsulfonyl)-imide (Mg(TFSI) 2): https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/magnesium-bis-trifluoromethylsulfonyl-imide-mg-tfsi-2.html
- Potassium bis-(trifluoromethanesulfonyl)-imide (KTFSI): https://www.winigenmaterials.com/products/potassium-bis-trifluoromethanesulfonyl-imide-ktfsi.html
- Additional chemical detail pages are listed in sitemap.xml.
